text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: While I'm walking about the shopping<n>district...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I notice Rice Shower watering flowers<n>at a flower
shop.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Some for you, and you... Phew. That<n>should do it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
H-huh? What are you doing here? I-I<n>mean,
welcome to the store...
choice_data_list: Forget me. What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's all my fault... I accidentally<n>knocked over
a flower pot, and the<n>shop manager tripped over
it and<n>sprained an ankle...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm helping out today as an apology. I<n>just hope
I don't make things worse...
choice_data_list: Want me to help water the flowers?

Want me to bring out more flowers from the
back?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
What? Y-you want to help? If you're<n>sure, then...
I would appreciate it a lot.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Aren't the flowers here just so<n>beautiful? I think
the roses are<n>especially pretty!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And when you water them, the petals<n>sparkle
like diamonds... I can't help<n>but be mesmerized
by them.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower and I chat happily as we<n>water the
flowers in the shop.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you... Please be careful.<n>Some of them
are pretty heavy...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
These flowers are so pretty... I<n>wonder if we'd
get more customers if<n>we displayed a bunch of
them out<n>front? Ehehe!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I eventually finish restocking the<n>inventory. It
was tougher than I<n>expected.
